mapper.sql: ISU_TARGET_SNO, CONT_NO, MEMBER_ID_ENC, MEMBER_NO, ISU_TARGET_TYPE_CD, ISU_REQ_DY, ISU_REQ_PT, USE_YN, ORG_CD, BRCH_CD, ISU_PT, ISU_DT, RESULT_CD, RESULT_MSG, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from t_isu_target
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into t_isu_target (ISU_TARGET_SNO, CONT_NO, MEMBER_ID_ENC, MEMBER_NO, ISU_TARGET_TYPE_CD, ISU_REQ_DY, ISU_REQ_PT, USE_YN, ORG_CD, BRCH_CD, ISU_PT, ISU_DT, RESULT_CD, RESULT_MSG, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT ) values (#{isuTargetSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isuTargetTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isuReqDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isuReqPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{useYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isuDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{resultCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resultMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into t_isu_target
ISU_TARGET_SNO,
CONT_NO,
MEMBER_ID_ENC,
MEMBER_NO,
ISU_TARGET_TYPE_CD,
ISU_REQ_DY,
ISU_REQ_PT,
USE_YN,
ORG_CD,
BRCH_CD,
ISU_PT,
ISU_DT,
RESULT_CD,
RESULT_MSG,
REG_USER_ID,
REG_DT,
LAST_MOD_USER_ID,
LAST_MOD_DT,
#{isuTargetSno,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{isuTargetTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isuReqDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isuReqPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{useYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{isuDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{resultCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{resultMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_isu_target
ISU_TARGET_SNO = #{row.isuTargetSno,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MEMBER_ID_ENC = #{row.memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MEMBER_NO = #{row.memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_TARGET_TYPE_CD = #{row.isuTargetTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ISU_REQ_DY = #{row.isuReqDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ISU_REQ_PT = #{row.isuReqPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_YN = #{row.useYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_CD = #{row.orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRCH_CD = #{row.brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ISU_PT = #{row.isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_DT = #{row.isuDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RESULT_CD = #{row.resultCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESULT_MSG = #{row.resultMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update t_isu_target set ISU_TARGET_SNO = #{row.isuTargetSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MEMBER_ID_ENC = #{row.memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMBER_NO = #{row.memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_TARGET_TYPE_CD = #{row.isuTargetTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISU_REQ_DY = #{row.isuReqDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISU_REQ_PT = #{row.isuReqPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_YN = #{row.useYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_CD = #{row.orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_CD = #{row.brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISU_PT = #{row.isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_DT = #{row.isuDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, RESULT_CD = #{row.resultCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESULT_MSG = #{row.resultMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update t_isu_target
CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MEMBER_ID_ENC = #{memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_TARGET_TYPE_CD = #{isuTargetTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ISU_REQ_DY = #{isuReqDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ISU_REQ_PT = #{isuReqPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_YN = #{useYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_CD = #{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRCH_CD = #{brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ISU_PT = #{isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_DT = #{isuDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RESULT_CD = #{resultCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESULT_MSG = #{resultMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where ISU_TARGET_SNO = #{isuTargetSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_isu_target set CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MEMBER_ID_ENC = #{memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_TARGET_TYPE_CD = #{isuTargetTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISU_REQ_DY = #{isuReqDy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISU_REQ_PT = #{isuReqPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_YN = #{useYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_CD = #{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_CD = #{brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISU_PT = #{isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_DT = #{isuDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, RESULT_CD = #{resultCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESULT_MSG = #{resultMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where ISU_TARGET_SNO = #{isuTargetSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}
